narrative:
Precinct Avon Lake City 4-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,447 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
